targets.rawSql:
WITH sampled_asset_balance AS (
  SELECT
    account_name,
    asset,
    LAST(total_usd) as total_usd,
    timestamp as latest_update
  FROM spot_balances
  WHERE timestamp >= DATEADD('m', -5, DATE_TRUNC('minute', NOW())) AND timestamp < DATE_TRUNC('minute', NOW())
  SAMPLE BY 30s FILL(PREV)
  GROUP BY timestamp, account_name, asset
)
,
sampled_spot_balance AS (SELECT
    account_name,
    SUM(total_usd) as total_usd,
    latest_update
  FROM sampled_asset_balance
  GROUP BY account_name, latest_update
  
  UNION
  
  SELECT
    account_name,
    SUM(total_usd) as total_usd,
    MAX(timestamp) as latest_update
  FROM spot_balances
  WHERE account_name NOT IN (SELECT account_name FROM sampled_asset_balance)
  LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY account_name, asset
  GROUP BY account_name
)
,
spot_balance AS (Select 
    account_name, 
    MAX(total_usd) as total_usd,
    MAX(latest_update) as latest_update
  from sampled_spot_balance
  GROUP BY account_name
)
,
futures_balance AS (
  SELECT
    account_name,
    SUM(total_usd) as total_usd,
    MAX(timestamp) as latest_update
  FROM futures_balances
  WHERE account_type = 'LINEAR_FUTURES'
  LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY account_name, asset
  GROUP BY account_name
),
actual_positions AS (
  SELECT instrument, account_type, account_name, position_side, amount, price_entry, price_row, unrealized_profit, timestamp
  FROM positions
  LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY account_name, instrument
),
last_prices AS (
  SELECT account_type, instrument, (bid + ask)/2 as price, timestamp
  FROM price_tickers
  WHERE account_type = 'LINEAR_FUTURES' and timestamp > dateadd('h', -1, now())
  LATEST ON timestamp PARTITION BY instrument 
),
pnl AS (
  SELECT sp.account_name, SUM(sp.unrealized_profit / sp.price_row * lp.price) as unrealized_profit_current
  FROM actual_positions sp 
  LEFT JOIN last_prices lp on sp.instrument = lp.instrument 
  WHERE sp.amount <> 0
  GROUP BY sp.account_name
),
volumes_week AS (
    SELECT
     account_name,
     SUM(volume_usd) as volume_usd,
     MAX(timestamp) as latest_update
  FROM et_trades
  WHERE account_type = 'spot' AND timestamp >= DATE_TRUNC('week', now()) AND timestamp < now()
  GROUP BY account_name
),
volumes_24h AS (
    SELECT
     account_name,
     SUM(volume_usd) as volume_usd
  FROM et_trades
  WHERE account_type = 'spot' AND timestamp >= dateadd('h', -24, now()) AND timestamp < now()
  GROUP BY account_name
),
volumes_1h AS (
    SELECT
     account_name,
     SUM(volume_usd) as volume_usd
  FROM et_trades
  WHERE account_type = 'spot' AND timestamp >= dateadd('h', -1, now()) AND timestamp < now()
  GROUP BY account_name
)
SELECT
    SUM(spot_balance.total_usd) + SUM(futures_balance.total_usd) + SUM(pnl.unrealized_profit_current) as total_usd, 
    SUM(volumes_1h.volume_usd) / 1000000 as volume_kk_1h,
    SUM(volumes_24h.volume_usd) / 1000000 as volume_kk_24h,
    SUM(volumes_week.volume_usd) / 1000000 as volume_kk_week,
    MAX(spot_balance.latest_update) as latest_balance_update,
    MAX(volumes_week.latest_update) as latest_volume_update
FROM spot_balance
LEFT JOIN futures_balance ON spot_balance.account_name = futures_balance.account_name
LEFT JOIN volumes_week ON spot_balance.account_name = volumes_week.account_name
LEFT JOIN volumes_24h ON spot_balance.account_name = volumes_24h.account_name
LEFT JOIN volumes_1h ON spot_balance.account_name = volumes_1h.account_name
LEFT JOIN pnl ON spot_balance.account_name = pnl.account_name
;
